name: Neglected
tip: A nourished Pet can be returned to hand with Hold Tight, as long as you don’t put another card on top of it!

name: Kitz’s Diner
tip: If you're nourished the round you play Oak it becomes extra effective.

name: Unforgiving Nature
tip: If you remove enough cards from the game with Fleeting, drawing Pet every round becomes easy.

name: Alone Again
tip: When Hollow sets your points to 0, it takes away the downside of negative Nourish.

name: Stray
tip: Exhale happens when the story resolves only if you have breath left over.

name: Imprint
tip: Sensualist gives you lots of points on a round when you already have carryover from Nourish or Inspire, so try not to go carried away.

name: Protector
tip: Bounty can effectively give 5 points in a round if you use the Nourish and your opponent doesn’t.

name: Outgrown
tip: Pomegranate could be the fruit you need to feed your Pet.

name: Inward
tip: Me & Her can double other types of carryover you play before it, like Nourish or a big Child
